summary: Backend testing of March 2026 PDF extraction bug fixes complete. 17/17 tests passed (100%). Verified: MSRP discount bug fix (Wagoneer S, Charger Daytona 2024 consumer_cash=0), SCI Lease column detection fix (Power Wagon lease_cash=$6,000), validation endpoint, Excel generation with 3 sheets.
critical_code_review_comments: parse_dollar() correctly filters MSRP discount lines containing 'msrp', '% off', 'discount' keywords
_detect_sci_columns() correctly detects lease_cash at col 2 (not col 4)
validate_extraction() properly generates warnings for Ram 2500/3500 without lease rates
Excel Rapport sheet correctly shows validation summary
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing March 2026 data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: (1) MSRP discount bug - parse_dollar now ignores lines with MSRP/% off/discount keywords, (2) SCI Lease column detection - _detect_sci_columns correctly identifies lease_cash at col 2 using 'LEASE CASH' header match, (3) Validation features added and working. 17 test cases cover all requested scenarios.
